_comment: WORKED EXAMPLE — not loaded by the hook. Copy what you want into tool-policy.config.json. runners = command prefixes that get intercepted (npx, pnpm exec, ...). allowlist = tools that pass through ('tool' allows any subcommand; 'tool:sub' allows only that subcommand). redirects = intercepted tool -> the canonical command to use instead (the message is shown verbatim to the agent; {project} is a literal placeholder, not substituted). blockedCommands = command prefixes to deny outright, matched quote-aware in command position. The values below target an nx monorepo.

redirects.storybook: nx dev ui   (per-app: nx book portal / nx book cma)
redirects.start-storybook: nx dev ui   (per-app: nx book portal / nx book cma)

blockedCommands.reason: Do not use git stash to check if tests pass on a clean state. Run tests against the current working tree.
